title: rubus glivicensis
intro: Rubus glivicensis, also known as the gilvice raspberry or wild gilvice, is a species of raspberry that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. The leaves and stems of the Rubus glivicensis plant are rich in antioxidants and have been used to treat various health issues, such as arthritis, high blood pressure, and certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus glivicensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
